docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT ADEMOLA, JOHN BIOMETRIX CORP AS TO RESPONDENT ARORA, VASU HEARING SET FOR APR-07-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL HEARD THIS DAY, PLAINTIFF VASU ARORA PRESENT, NO APPEARANCE BY DEFT. JOHN ADEMOLA, WITNESS S/E, DOCU EVID INTROD, MATTER SUBMITTED, JUDGE PRO TEM MARTE BASSI, CLERK GREG CHUCK, NOT REPORTED (525)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED
MINUTES FOR APR-07-2004 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARORA, VASU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ADEMOLA, JOHN $625.00 PRINCIPAL, $127.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $752.00, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
